answers: Coffee types: espresso (concentrated), americano (espresso+water), latte (espresso+steamed milk), cappuccino (espresso+foam+milk).
Good coffee: use fresh beans, grind just before brewing, use proper water temperature (195-205°F), and right coffee-to-water ratio.
Benefits: improves focus, boosts metabolism, rich in antioxidants. But limit to 3-4 cups/day and avoid after 2pm for better sleep.
Coffee brewing methods: French press (bold), pour over (clean), espresso machine (strong), cold brew (smooth, low acid).
